key_risks: Hot June 10 CPI/June 11 PPI prints could spike yields and hurt all equity sectors
Hawkish June 17 FOMC surprise despite 98.7% hold probability
Semiconductor pullback if AI capex guidance disappoints

portfolio.rationale: Defensive sector with strong recent momentum (+6.4% 30d), reasonable valuation amid sticky inflation and weakening sentiment.
FY27 $1.5T defense budget tailwind; resilient in geopolitical risk environment.
AI capex acceleration, Q1 global semi sales +25% QoQ, strongest secular momentum into earnings season.
ISM Manufacturing 54.0 with new orders 56.8 rising; durable goods +8% MoM signals capex cycle.
Defensive quality tilt with positive recent momentum amid sticky inflation, hot PPI, weak sentiment.

portfolio_rationale: Barbell of defensive quality (Healthcare, Dividend) with secular AI/defense/industrial momentum given sticky 3.8% CPI, hot PPI 6% YoY, weak consumer sentiment (44.8), and Fed on hold. Avoiding rate-sensitive long duration and frothy crypto/EM after sharp drawdowns.
rationale_summary: Tilt toward defensives with strong relative momentum and secular catalysts (AI semis, defense budget, capex cycle) while sidestepping duration and stretched mega-cap growth into hot inflation prints and June FOMC.
